text: I find myself immersed in a futuristic and thoughtful space. The environment feels innovative and carefully curated—glass walls revealing a room lit with blue hues, a clear focus on research and development, and words about coexisting with intelligent systems. There’s a quiet sense of anticipation and curiosity, an invitation to contemplate the ethics and possibilities of technology. I feel inspired and slightly out of place, as if on the edge of discovery, drawn to learn more about this evolving relationship between humans and machines.
